item.title: Creamy Garlic Parmesan Orzo: A Quick One-Pot Wonder
item.description: This creamy garlic parmesan orzo is a delightful one-pot dish that’s ready in just 20 minutes. Perfect as a side or a vegetarian main, it’s a cozy meal for any night!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 5 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 20 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup orzo pasta
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 2 cups vegetable broth
  • 1/2 cup heavy cream
  • 1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • Chopped parsley for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. In a large pot, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add minced garlic and sauté for about 1 minute until fragrant.
  2. Stir in the orzo pasta and cook for another minute, allowing it to toast slightly.
  3. Pour in the vegetable broth and bring to a gentle boil. Reduce heat and let it simmer for about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
  4. Once the orzo is tender and most of the liquid is absorbed, stir in the heavy cream and Parmesan cheese. Mix until creamy and well combined.
  5. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Let it cook for an additional 2 minutes, then remove from heat.
  6. Garnish with chopped parsley before serving.

item.title: Keto Philly Cheesesteak Rolls: A Low-Carb Delight
item.description: These keto Philly cheesesteak rolls are a savory, low-carb twist on a classic favorite. With tender beef and gooey cheese, they're perfect for a quick dinner or snack!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 45 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 pound thinly sliced beef (like ribeye or sirloin)
  • 1 medium onion, sliced
  • 1 bell pepper, sliced
  • 8 ounces provolone cheese, sliced
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 1 teaspoon garlic powder
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • 4 large lettuce leaves (for wrapping)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add the sliced onion and bell pepper. Sauté until softened, about 5-7 minutes.
  2. Add the sliced beef to the skillet, seasoning with garlic powder, salt, and pepper. Cook until the beef is browned, about 5-7 minutes.
  3. Once the beef is cooked, reduce the heat to low and layer the provolone cheese on top. Cover the skillet until the cheese melts, about 2-3 minutes.
  4. Remove from heat and let cool slightly. Spoon the beef and cheese mixture into the lettuce leaves, rolling them up like burritos.
  5. Serve immediately, or enjoy as a tasty snack later!

item.title: Sweet and Spicy Baked Chili Chicken for Busy Nights
item.description: This Baked Sweet Chili Chicken is a weeknight lifesaver! With a perfect blend of sweet and spicy, it's quick to whip up and satisfying. Serve it with rice or veggies for a complete meal!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 45 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 boneless, skinless chicken breasts
  • 1/2 cup sweet chili sauce
  • 2 tablespoons soy sauce
  • 1 tablespoon olive oil
  • 1 teaspoon garlic powder
  • 1/2 teaspoon black pepper
  • 1/4 teaspoon red pepper flakes (optional)
  • Chopped green onions for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. Preheat your oven to 400°F (200°C).
  2. In a bowl, mix together the sweet chili sauce, soy sauce, olive oil, garlic powder, black pepper, and red pepper flakes if using.
  3. Place the chicken breasts in a baking dish and pour the sauce mixture over them, making sure they're well coated.
  4. Bake in the preheated oven for about 25-30 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and no longer pink in the center.
  5. Let it rest for a few minutes before slicing. Garnish with chopped green onions and serve!

item.title: Sticky Garlic Chicken Noodles: Your New Go-To Weeknight Dinner
item.description: These sticky garlic chicken noodles are a cozy, quick dinner that's perfect for busy weeknights. Sweet, savory, and oh-so-satisfying!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 45 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 300g chicken breast, sliced
  • 200g egg noodles
  • 4 cloves garlic, minced
  • 3 tablespoons soy sauce
  • 2 tablespoons honey
  • 1 tablespoon sesame oil
  • 1 tablespoon vegetable oil
  • 2 green onions, chopped
  • Salt and pepper, to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. Cook the egg noodles according to package instructions, then drain and set aside.
  2. In a large pan, heat vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Add the sliced chicken, season with salt and pepper, and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
  3. Add the minced garlic to the pan and sauté for another minute until fragrant.
  4. In a small bowl, mix together soy sauce, honey, and sesame oil. Pour this mixture over the chicken and let it simmer for about 3-4 minutes, allowing the sauce to thicken slightly.
  5. Toss in the cooked noodles and stir until everything is well coated in that delicious sticky sauce. Cook for an additional 2 minutes to heat through.
  6. Serve hot, garnished with chopped green onions.

item.title: Creamy Keto Garlic Mushroom Chicken Casserole for Cozy Nights
item.description: This Keto Garlic Mushroom Chicken Casserole is a creamy, low-carb delight! Packed with protein and healthy fats, it’s perfect for family dinners or quick weeknight meals. You’ll love how easy it is to make!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 45 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 lb chicken breast, diced
  • 2 cups mushrooms, sliced
  • 1 cup heavy cream
  • 1 cup shredded mozzarella cheese
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 teaspoon dried thyme
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. Preheat your oven to 375°F (190°C).
  2. In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add the diced chicken and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
  3. Add the sliced mushrooms and minced garlic to the skillet. Sauté for another 5 minutes until mushrooms are tender.
  4. Stir in the heavy cream, mozzarella cheese, thyme, salt, and pepper. Mix well and let it simmer for 2-3 minutes.
  5. Transfer the mixture to a greased baking dish and spread it evenly.
  6. Bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, until bubbly and golden on top.
  7. Let it cool for a few minutes before serving. Enjoy!

item.title: Hearty Crockpot Beef Stew for Cozy Nights
item.description: This hearty crockpot beef stew is the ultimate comfort meal. Tender beef, soft veggies, and a savory broth simmer together for hours. Perfect for chilly evenings or meal prep!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 480 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 495 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 lbs beef chuck, cut into 1-inch cubes
  • 4 medium carrots, sliced
  • 4 medium potatoes, diced
  • 1 onion, chopped
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 4 cups beef broth
  • 2 tbsp tomato paste
  • 1 tsp dried thyme
  • 1 bay leaf
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • 2 tbsp olive oil

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Brown the beef cubes on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
  2. Transfer the browned beef to the crockpot. Add carrots, potatoes, onion, and garlic on top.
  3. In a bowl, mix the beef broth, tomato paste, thyme, bay leaf, salt, and pepper. Pour this mixture over the ingredients in the crockpot.
  4. Cover and cook on low for 8 hours or on high for 4 hours, until the beef is tender and the vegetables are cooked through.
  5. Before serving, remove the bay leaf and adjust seasoning if needed. Enjoy your cozy stew!

item.title: Effortless Pioneer Woman's Crockpot Beef Stew for Cozy Nights
item.description: This Easy Pioneer Woman's Crockpot Beef Stew is the ultimate comfort food. Packed with tender beef, hearty potatoes, and carrots, it’s perfect for chilly evenings or busy weeknights!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 480 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 495 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 pounds beef chuck, cut into 1-inch cubes
  • 4 medium potatoes, peeled and chopped
  • 3 large carrots, sliced
  • 1 onion, diced
  • 4 cloves garlic, minced
  • 4 cups beef broth
  • 2 tablespoons Worcestershire sauce
  • 1 teaspoon dried thyme
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • 1 tablespoon olive oil

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Brown the beef cubes on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
  2. Transfer the browned beef to your slow cooker. Add the potatoes, carrots, onion, and garlic.
  3. Pour in the beef broth and Worcestershire sauce. Sprinkle with thyme, salt, and pepper.
  4. Cover and cook on low for 8 hours or on high for 4 hours, until the beef is tender and the flavors meld.
  5. Taste and adjust seasoning before serving. Enjoy with crusty bread for a complete meal!

item.title: Crispy Orange Chicken with a Sweet and Tangy Twist
item.description: This crispy orange chicken is a delightful blend of sweet and tangy flavors, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 45 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 lb chicken breast, cut into bite-sized pieces
  • 1/2 cup cornstarch
  • 1/4 cup all-purpose flour
  • 1/2 tsp salt
  • 1/4 tsp black pepper
  • 1/2 cup orange juice
  • 1/4 cup soy sauce
  • 1/4 cup brown sugar
  • 1 tbsp rice vinegar
  • 1 tbsp minced garlic
  • 1 tbsp minced ginger
  • 1 tbsp sesame oil
  • 2 green onions, sliced for garnish
  • Oil for frying

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. In a bowl, mix cornstarch, flour, salt, and pepper. Toss chicken pieces in this mixture until well-coated.
  2. Heat oil in a deep skillet over medium-high heat. Fry the chicken in batches until golden brown and crispy, about 5-7 minutes. Remove and drain on paper towels.
  3. In a separate saucepan, combine orange juice, soy sauce, brown sugar, rice vinegar, garlic, ginger, and sesame oil. Bring to a simmer and cook for about 5 minutes until slightly thickened.
  4. Add the fried chicken to the sauce and toss to coat evenly. Cook for another 2 minutes to heat through.
  5. Serve hot, garnished with sliced green onions.

item.title: Cheesy Mexican Cornbread That'll Wow Your Guests!
item.description: You gotta try this cheesy Mexican cornbread! It's packed with sweet corn and melty cheese. Ready in just 30 minutes, it's a hit at any gathering. So, pin this recipe for your next get-together!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 8

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup cornmeal (I use Bob's Red Mill)
  • 1 cup all-purpose flour, sifted
  • 1 tablespoon baking powder
  • 1/2 teaspoon salt
  • 1 cup shredded cheese (Kerrygold recommended)
  • 1 cup milk
  • 1/2 cup melted butter
  • 2 large eggs
  • 1 cup sweet corn (fresh or canned)
  • 1-2 jalapeños, diced (optional for heat)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. Preheat your oven to 400°F (200°C). Grease a 9x13-inch baking dish (trust me, you'll want it to be non-stick).
  2. In a large bowl, mix together cornmeal, flour, baking powder, and salt until well combined.
  3. In another bowl, whisk together milk, melted butter, and eggs. Then, fold in the sweet corn, cheese, and jalapeños if using.
  4. Combine the wet and dry ingredients, mixing just until everything's moistened - don’t overdo it.
  5. Pour the batter into the prepared baking dish and spread it out evenly. Bake for about 25-30 minutes until golden brown on top.
  6. Let it cool for a few minutes before slicing. Serve warm and watch it disappear!

item.title: Creamy Ranch Chicken CrockPot - Easy Family Dinner
item.description: This Creamy Ranch Chicken CrockPot recipe is a hassle-free dinner flavorful. With minimal prep, it cooks itself to perfection, making it a family favorite. for a delicious meal!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 240 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 255 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 pound chicken breasts
  • 1 packet ranch seasoning
  • 1 cup cream of chicken soup
  • 1/2 cup chicken broth
  • 1/2 cup sour cream

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. Place chicken breasts in the CrockPot.
  2. Sprinkle ranch seasoning over the chicken.
  3. In a bowl, mix cream of chicken soup and chicken broth, then pour over the chicken.
  4. Cover and cook on low for 4 hours.
  5. Stir in sour cream before serving.

item.title: Sweet Hawaiian Crockpot Chicken for Busy Families
item.description: This Sweet Hawaiian Crockpot Chicken is a tropical delight that brings the family together. With its tender chicken and sweet pineapple blend, it's a dish everyone will love. for an unforgettable meal!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 240 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 255 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 pound chicken breast
  • 1 cup pineapple chunks
  • 1/2 cup soy sauce
  • 1/4 cup brown sugar
  • 1 tablespoon garlic minced
  • 1 tablespoon ginger minced

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. Place chicken breasts in the crockpot.
  2. Add pineapple chunks, soy sauce, brown sugar, garlic, and ginger.
  3. Cover and cook on low for 4-6 hours or until chicken is tender.
  4. Shred the chicken and mix well with the sauce before serving.

item.title: 30-Minute Creamy White Chicken Chili
item.description: This creamy white chicken chili is a comforting bowl of goodness that comes together in just 30 minutes. Packed with flavor and creamy texture, it's perfect for a cozy weeknight dinner or a gathering with friends.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 45 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 pound cooked chicken, shredded
  • 1 can white beans, drained and rinsed
  • 1 cup chicken broth
  • 1 cup heavy cream
  • 1 tablespoon olive oil
  • 1 onion, diced
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 teaspoon cumin
  • 1 teaspoon chili powder
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • Fresh cilantro for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
  2. Add diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
  3. Stir in minced garlic, cumin, and chili powder, cooking for another minute.
  4. Add shredded chicken, white beans, and chicken broth, bringing to a simmer.
  5. Stir in heavy cream and season with salt and pepper, cooking for an additional 10 minutes.
  6. Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro.

item.title: A Unique Twist with Maple Syrup for Family Gatherings

item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 60 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 75 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 pounds ground beef or turkey
  • 1 onion, chopped
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 can (28 ounces) crushed tomatoes
  • 1 can (15 ounces) kidney beans, drained and rinsed
  • 1 can (15 ounces) black beans, drained and rinsed
  • 2 tablespoons chili powder
  • 1 tablespoon cumin
  • 1 tablespoon maple syrup or 2 ounces dark chocolate
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
  2. Add chopped onion and garlic, sautÃ© until softened.
  3. Stir in ground beef or turkey, cook until browned.
  4. Add crushed tomatoes, kidney beans, black beans, chili powder, cumin, and maple syrup or dark chocolate.
  5. Season with salt and pepper, bring to a simmer.
  6. Reduce heat to low, cover, and let simmer for 45 minutes, stirring occasionally.

item.title: Easy Sweet Potato Casserole for Thanksgiving Family Gatherings
item.description: This easy Sweet Potato Casserole is the perfect fall dish that is always a hit to your Thanksgiving table. With a delightful marshmallow topping, it's a crowd-pleaser that everyone will adore. make it special!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 50 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 65 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 12

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 cups sweet potatoes, peeled and cubed
  • 1/2 cup brown sugar
  • 1/4 cup butter, melted
  • 1/2 cup milk
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • 2 cups mini marshmallows

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C).
  2. Boil sweet potatoes in a large pot until tender, about 20 minutes.
  3. Drain and mash the sweet potatoes in a large bowl.
  4. Mix in brown sugar, melted butter, milk, and vanilla extract until smooth.
  5. Transfer the mixture to a greased baking dish and top with mini marshmallows.
  6. Bake for 30 minutes or until the marshmallows are golden brown.

  4. Add minced garlic and cook for an additional minute until fragrant.
  5. Pour in chicken broth and heavy cream, stirring to combine.

  7. Toss in the cooked pasta and mix until well coated.
  8. Serve hot, garnished with fresh basil.

item.title: Italian Sausage Bow Tie Pasta
item.description: This Italian Sausage Bow Tie Pasta is a weeknight wonder that combines tender pasta with savory sausage in a creamy sauce. It's quick, easy, and utterly irresistible, making it the perfect dish for busy evenings.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 45 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 12 ounces bow tie pasta
  • 1 pound Italian sausage, casings removed
  • 1 cup heavy cream
  • 1 cup grated Parmesan cheese
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • Fresh basil for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. Cook bow tie pasta according to package instructions; drain and set aside.
  2. In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat and add the Italian sausage, breaking it apart with a spoon.
  3. Cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
  4. Add minced garlic and cook for an additional minute until fragrant.
  5. Stir in heavy cream and bring to a simmer.
  6. Add grated Parmesan cheese and stir until melted and combined.
  7. Toss the cooked pasta with the sauce, seasoning with salt and pepper to taste.
  8. Serve hot, garnished with fresh basil.

item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 45 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 pound shrimp peeled and deveined
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 1 cup orange juice
  • 1 tablespoon soy sauce
  • 1 tablespoon cornstarch
  • 2 tablespoons sugar
  • 1 teaspoon garlic, minced
  • 1 teaspoon ginger, minced
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • Green onions for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. In a bowl, mix orange juice, soy sauce, cornstarch, sugar, garlic, and ginger.
  2. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
  3. Add shrimp and cook for 2-3 minutes per side until pink.
  4. Pour the orange sauce over the shrimp and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes until thickened.
  5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
  6. Garnish with green onions before serving.

item.title: Eddie's Award Winning Chili
item.description: Indulge in Eddie's Award Winning Chili, a hearty and flavorful dish that combines tender meats, zesty spices, and a touch of heat. Perfect for gatherings or cozy nights in, this chili is sure to impress your family and friends.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 30 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 210 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 240 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 10

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 pound ground beef
  • 1 pound ground pork
  • 2 cans kidney beans, drained and rinsed
  • 2 fresh chile peppers, chopped
  • 1 large onion, diced
  • 4 cloves garlic, minced
  • 2 cans diced tomatoes
  • 1 cup beer
  • 2 tablespoons chili powder
  • 1 tablespoon cumin
  • 1 tablespoon paprika
  • Salt and pepper to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. In a large pot, brown the ground beef and pork over medium heat until fully cooked.
  2. Add the onions and garlic, cooking until softened.
  3. Stir in the chopped chile peppers, diced tomatoes, kidney beans, and beer.
  4. Season with chili powder, cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper.
  5. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and let simmer for at least 3 hours, stirring occasionally.

item.title: Effortless Crispy Orange Chicken
item.description: Craving a dish that's both crispy and packed with flavor? Discover our Effortless Crispy Orange Chicken recipe! This mouthwatering meal combines tender chicken with a zesty orange glaze thatâ€™s sure to please the whole family.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 45 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 pound chicken, cut into bite-sized pieces
  • 1/2 cup orange juice
  • 1/4 cup soy sauce
  • 2 tablespoons honey
  • 1 tablespoon cornstarch
  • 2 tablespoons vegetable oil
  • Salt and pepper to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. In a bowl, mix orange juice, soy sauce, honey, and cornstarch until well combined.
  2. Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
  3. Season chicken pieces with salt and pepper, then add to the skillet.
  4. Cook chicken for about 5-7 minutes, turning occasionally until golden brown.
  5. Pour the orange sauce over the chicken and cook for an additional 5 minutes until the sauce thickens and coats the chicken.

item.title: Easy Creamy Ranch Chicken for Busy Families
item.description: This easy creamy ranch chicken is a weeknight lifesaver! With simple ingredients and a deliciously comforting flavor, it's sure to please everyone at the table. Try it tonight for a quick and satisfying meal!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 45 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 pound chicken breasts
  • 1 packet ranch seasoning
  • 8 ounces cream cheese
  • 1 tablespoon olive oil
  • Salt and pepper to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
  2. Season chicken breasts with salt, pepper, and ranch seasoning.
  3. Add chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes per side.
  4. Reduce heat and add cream cheese, stirring until melted and creamy.
  5. Serve warm with rice or veggies.
